stock_market.summary: Markets eyeing a tactical rebound; focus shifting from policy to productivity (AI/Infra). Defensive sectors like healthcare and consumer staples remain favored amid geopolitical tensions.

key_metrics.impact: Rotation to defensive sectors; AI/Infra interest

art_market.summary: April activity accelerating with ART OnO in Seoul (April 3-5) and Christie's 40th anniversary preparations in Asia.

key_metrics.status: Robust high-value segment; focus on provenanced works
